title: Windows temp OpenAPI filepath is not relative
rationale: Windows can return an absolute path when relativizing an OpenAPI spec from a different drive than the new workspace; `fern init` now copies that spec into the workspace instead of tripping the relative-path invariant.
fixSummary: Copy cross-drive OpenAPI specs into new workspaces before writing generators.yml.
problemSignature: OpenAPI or workspace path conversion received an absolute path where a relative path was required; path boundary bug until fixed.
